sections.paragraph:
verb לפרוץ

to break into; break through, breach, run; break, crack; break out, erupt; burst into; overflow, spread

verb להיפרץ

be broken, cracked, breached; broken unto

verb להתפרץ

to break into; break through; break out; burst into

masculine noun

breach; disaster

masculine noun

gush, stream, spout, spurt

noun

Peretz (family name) ; Amir Peretz (born 1952) , Defense Minister of Israel and Deputy Prime Minister in the 31st Israeli Government, leader of the Israeli Labour Party, former chairman of the Israeli Histadrut federation
